title: Linux User Privilege Change Correlation
description: Correlates sudo/su usage with subsequent sensitive file access or network activity, revealing post-escalation attacker behavior.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ('Process Name' in ('sudo', 'su', 'pkexec') or msg like '*/etc/shadow*' or msg like '*/etc/passwd*' or msg like '*useradd*') | stats count as actions, distinctcount('Process Name') as distinct_procs, earliest(Time) as first_seen, latest(Time) as last_seen by 'Host Name', User | where distinct_procs >= 2 | sort -actions
notes: A user escalating privileges then immediately accessing sensitive files is a classic post-exploitation pattern.
